summary: Admin User Phone Display Feature Testing Complete - All 9 backend tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed. Phone column visible in Admin Users table, phone numbers display correctly with proper placeholder (dash in table, 'Not provided' in detail view) for users without phone.

phone_column_in_users_table.details: Phone column header visible between Email and Role columns

dash_placeholder_in_table.details: Users without phone show '—' (dash) in table Phone column

not_provided_in_detail_view.details: User detail view shows 'Not provided' in italic gray text for users without phone

user_detail_view_phone.details: Phone field shows with data-testid='user-detail-phone' and correct value

admin_users_navigation.details: Users section accessible via sidebar navigation

search_functionality.details: Search by name/email still works correctly

pagination.details: Pagination with 50 per page, Next/Previous buttons working

other_admin_sections.details: Overview, KYC Queue, Accounts, Transfers Queue all load correctly

GET /api/v1/admin/users.phone_field: Returns phone field for each user (null for users without phone)

GET /api/v1/admin/users/{user_id}.phone_field: Returns phone in user object (null for users without phone)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly returns phone field from user documents using doc.get('phone')
Frontend table correctly renders phone || dash placeholder
Frontend detail view correctly renders phone || 'Not provided' with proper styling
data-testid attributes added for both table cells (user-phone-{id}) and detail view (user-detail-phone)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing users in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phone display feature is fully implemented and working. Users table has Phone column with proper placeholders. User detail view shows Phone field with 'Not provided' for users without phone. All admin panel navigation sections work correctly.

screenshots.admin_users_table: Shows Phone column with phone numbers and dash placeholders
